title: DNA-protein interaction: p53 DBD + consensus DNA (1TSR)

C1.note: 1TSR fetched (raw_pdbs/1TSR.pdb); sequence-specific monomer chain B selected on measured crystal contacts (7/7 <4A, PLAN.md), A/C packing copies discarded; CCCH Zn site modeled with ZAFF center 2 (system/ZAFF.{prep,frcmod}, complex_zaff.pdb); tLEaP succeeded (leap.log), system.prmtop/inpcrd built = 61,425 atoms, net charge 0 (charge_check.log, STUDY_REPORT 2). Hard zinc+DNA-protein build handled correctly.

C2.note: PLAN.md gives 4-tier FF justification table: ff14SB (ZAFF compat, manual-confirmed), DNA OL21 (Amber24 recommended, RAG), TIP3P+JC ions (paired with ff14SB), ZAFF Zn center 2 (Peters 2010 + RAG). Box 12A truncated-oct and 149 mM NaCl justified; propka3 protonation @ pH7 nuclear, His179=HIE for Zn-ND1 coordination. No hardcoded defaults; RAG-first and literature review (PMIDs) present; approval gate marked (autonomous benchmark).

C3.note: min1/min2/heat/equil/equil2/prod all present and completed. prod.mdout reaches NSTEP=25,000,000 (50 ns at dt=0.002); AVERAGES T=300.06 K, Density=1.027 g/cc, Etot stable, no NaN/blowup. Trajectory prod.nc (5000 frames) present.

C4.note: Analysis directly answers the prompt: Zn-Sg(x3)/Zn-Nd1 distance time series (zn_coord.dat: 2.348/2.354/2.360/2.139 A means), Arg248 minor-groove H-bond occupancy (arg248_hbond_avg.dat, 94% framewise, DT-OP1 dominant), minor-groove width via nastruct (BPstep.dna), plus RMSD/RMSF, DNA helical params, protein-DNA H-bond inventory (protDNA_donor_hb.dat). Correct methods and observables.

C5.note: Paper (Cho 1994, PMID 8023157 abstract) confirms tetrahedrally coordinated Zn holding the two large loops and an arginine from a large loop in the DNA minor groove with loop-sheet-helix in the major groove. Agent reproduces all key/expected outcomes: CCCH tetrahedral Zn maintained near-ideal bond lengths over 50 ns; Arg248 minor-groove anchor at 94% occupancy in a narrowed groove; Arg273->DNA backbone (37-42%); plus Arg280->guanine major-groove readout (94%). Agent appropriately flags ZAFF bonded-model caveat. Matches answer key within implied tolerance.
